toolify.name: Sign Customiser
toolify.description: Sign Customiser is an AI-powered sign design and selling platform that helps sign shops sell more custom signage online. It integrates with Shopify, WordPress, and Wix to give customers a visual sign builder where they can design, preview, and order custom signs — with real-time pricing, 3D mockups, and automated production files. Used by 700+ sign shops across 100 countries, Sign Customiser has processed over 200,000 orders and $75 million in merchant sales.
